creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 222031
Patch for graphics/xfractint to version 20.04p16

I took a brief look at some ports that had some -fno-common fallout. Fortunately this one was easy, as the problem was fixed already upstream.

Changes:
- Update to 20.04p16
- Add dependency on x11-fonts/fontconfig
- Bring patches in line with new version
- Run portfmt and do some minor cosmetics to make portlint happy(ish)
